units.title: 递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25
病句门诊 III + 识字 Day 26
Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night

Exponents & Order of Ops III.q: Which expression matches: 'the square of the sum of 4 and 1'?

Integers & the Number Line.q: The temperature is −8°C. It rises 5°C. What is it now? (number only)
A diver is at −12 m and goes DOWN 6 m more. Where is she? (number only)
Basement floor B2 in an elevator is best written as —
Which numbers are LESS than 0? (select all)
Which situations describe a NEGATIVE number? (select all)
Integers & the Number Line.x: you earn 10 dollars、parking level B3、the temperature falls to 5 degrees below zero
Integers & the Number Line.r: 6 m below sea level、the temperature falls to 5 degrees below zero、parking level B3

长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.q: 最忙的是哪种蚂蚁？它们不做下面哪件事？
文中说兵蚁「像门口的卫兵」，这是——
同伴能准确找到食物，是因为——
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.r: 顺着前面蚂蚁留下的气味走

长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.q: 用手指在蚂蚁队伍中间划一下，蚂蚁会乱成一团，原因是——
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.r: 气味路被擦掉了，它们失去了方向

长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.q: 「一个大蚁巢常常住着几万只蚂蚁」用的说明方法是——
下面哪些说法与文章相符？（多选）
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.x: 蚂蚁靠气味和触角传递消息
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.r: 蚁巢通道最深能到两米多、蚂蚁靠气味和触角传递消息、擦掉气味后蚂蚁会迷路

长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.q: 文中哪些地方用了「打比方」？（多选）
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.r: 蚁巢像一栋倒着建的高楼、蚁后是王国的「心脏」、兵蚁像门口的卫兵

长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.q: 如果给文章换个题目，下面哪些合适？（多选）
长文阅读·蚂蚁的城市.r: 《地下的蚂蚁王国》、《分工合作的小蚂蚁》、《神奇的「气味路」和蚂蚁的家》

成语精细辨析 IV.q: 「为了造出这艘船模，他常常________，连饭都忘了吃。」填——
「练字要________，三天打鱼两天晒网是练不好的。」填——
「他________地盯着显微镜，生怕错过任何变化。」填最贴切的成语。
「妹妹________地拼模型，谁叫她都听不见。」填——

成语精细辨析 IV.x: 经过日积月累，他认识了很多字。
成语精细辨析 IV.r: 他持之以恒地打了一个哈欠。

成语精细辨析 IV.q: 哪些句子的成语使用正确？（多选）
成语精细辨析 IV.x: 他废寝忘食地准备比赛。
成语精细辨析 IV.r: 他废寝忘食地准备比赛。、展览馆里参观的人络绎不绝。、坚持锻炼要持之以恒。

成语精细辨析 IV.q: 哪些搭配是正确的？（多选）
成语精细辨析 IV.r: 字写得一丝不苟、知识靠日积月累、做事持之以恒

成语精细辨析 IV.q: 「都等不及了」——「迫不________待」。点选正确的字。
「知识要一点一点________累。」点选正确的字。
「他读书读得废寝________食。」点选正确的字。
「专心________志，才能把事做好。」点选正确的字。

Ecosystems & Food Chains.q: Which chain is in the CORRECT order?
Which of these are PRODUCERS? (select all)
If the small fish in a lake all died, which effects are LIKELY? (select all)
Ecosystems & Food Chains.x: birds that eat small fish would leave or go hungry
Ecosystems & Food Chains.r: big fish would have less to eat、birds that eat small fish would leave or go hungry、the tiny water plants they ate might grow more

Ecosystems & Food Chains.q: Which statements about ecosystems are TRUE? (select all)
Ecosystems & Food Chains.x: Arrows in a chain point at the food.
Ecosystems & Food Chains.r: Energy enters most ecosystems as sunlight.、Decomposers return nutrients to the soil.、A food web is many chains connected.

Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.q: How many STANZAS does this poem have?
How many LINES are in each stanza?
Which word rhymes with 'rest' in stanza 1?
The rhyme pattern of each stanza is —
'Like tired birds that seek their nest' is a —
The MOOD of this poem is —
'Morning light unties the ribbons of the night' most likely means —

Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.x: The lighthouse is a patient eye、Like soft knocks on a wooden door
Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.r: Like tired birds that seek their nest、Like soft knocks on a wooden door

Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.q: Which poetic tools appear in this poem? (select all)
Which statements about the poem are TRUE? (select all)
Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.x: The poem ends at sunrise — morning light appears.、The lighthouse beam moves left and right.、The poem describes a violent storm.、The boats are compared to tired birds.
Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.r: The poem is set at night.、The boats are compared to tired birds.、The lighthouse beam moves left and right.、The poem ends at sunrise — morning light appears.

Reading Poetry: The Harbour at Night.q: Which pairs of words RHYME in this poem? (select all)

Verbes en -er · La négation.q: Which is the correct NEGATIVE of 'Il joue.'?
Which is correct before a vowel?
Verbes en -er · La négation.x: Je ne aime pas les épinards.

Verbes en -er · La négation.q: 'Nous ne mangeons pas de poisson.' means —
How do you say 'She does not play'?

Verbes en -er · La négation.x: Elle habitons à Paris.、Je parles très vite.、Nous aimons la mer.
Verbes en -er · La négation.r: Je parle français.、Tu joues au parc.、Nous aimons la mer.

Verbes en -er · La négation.q: Which are CORRECT negative sentences? (select all)
Verbes en -er · La négation.r: Je ne joue pas.、Il n'aime pas le café.、Nous ne parlons pas fort.

递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.q: 「妹妹________会背这首诗，________能讲出诗的意思。」填——
「爷爷不但会修船，而且会造船。」这句话的关系是——
哪些关联词表示「递进」？（多选）
递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.x: 虽然…但是…、不但…而且…、不仅…还…

递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.q: 哪些句子用了「转折」关系？（多选）
递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.x: 虽然他很累，但是他坚持跑完了。、一到周末，我们就去图书馆。、他不但会唱歌，而且会跳舞。
递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.r: 虽然他很累，但是他坚持跑完了。、天气尽管很冷，大家还是来了。、这本书很旧，却很有意思。

递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.q: 哪些句子的关联词使用正确？（多选）
递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.x: 虽然下雨了，但是比赛照常进行。、妈妈虽然工作忙，但是每天陪我读书。、尽管他不会游泳，还是他喜欢大海。
递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.r: 他不但学习好，而且乐于助人。、虽然下雨了，但是比赛照常进行。、妈妈虽然工作忙，但是每天陪我读书。

递进与转折专项 + 识字 Day 25.q: 「他每天很________就起床读书。」点选一个字。
「中________十二点，太阳最高。」点选一个字。
「一小时有六十________钟。」点选一个字。

病句门诊 III + 识字 Day 26.q: 「通过这次比赛，使我明白了团结的力量。」怎样修改最恰当？
「他睡觉前总觉得口渴。」两个「觉」的读音是——

病句门诊 III + 识字 Day 26.x: 听了老师的话，受到了很大教育。
病句门诊 III + 识字 Day 26.r: 我们要发扬优点，改正缺点。

病句门诊 III + 识字 Day 26.q: 「他大概用了估计十分钟。」这句话的毛病是——
「哥哥________了我一支新铅笔。」点选一个字。
「我到处________不到我的橡皮了。」点选一个字。
「用完的东西要________回原来的地方。」点选一个字。
「请帮我把桌上的书________过来。」点选一个字。
「作业写完要________好，别弄丢。」点选两个字。

Ratios, Rates & Working Backwards.q: $12 for 3 notebooks. How much for ONE notebook? (number only)
A boat travels 45 km in 3 hours. How many km per hour?
2/3 of a number is 12. What is the number?
3/4 of a number is 21. What is the number?
25% of a number is 8. What is the number?
The ratio of boys to girls is 2:3. There are 8 boys. How many girls?
Which ratios are equivalent to 2:5? (select all)
A recipe uses flour and sugar in the ratio 4:1. Which statements are TRUE? (select all)
Ratios, Rates & Working Backwards.r: 8 cups flour needs 2 cups sugar、flour is 4 times the sugar、12 cups flour needs 3 cups sugar

Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.q: A parallelogram has base 8 and height 5. What is its AREA?
An L-shaped deck is a 10 by 6 rectangle with a 4 by 2 corner cut out. What is its AREA?
A triangle has base 12 and height 5. What is its AREA?
A box has volume 60. Its length is 5 and width is 3. What is its HEIGHT?
A box is 4 by 4 by 7. What is its VOLUME?
Kai buys 3 T-shirts at $12 each and pays with $50. How much CHANGE does he get?
To find the area of an L-shape, the BEST first move is —
Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.x: multiply all the numbers you see
how much rope goes around a field
Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.r: how much water fills an aquarium

Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.x: An L-shape's area can be found by subtracting the notch、Parallelogram area = base × height、Volume of a box = l × w × h
Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.r: Triangle area = base × height ÷ 2、Parallelogram area = base × height、Volume of a box = l × w × h、An L-shape's area can be found by subtracting the notch

Geometry IV & Multi-step Problems.q: A captain buys 5 boxes of flags. Each box holds 8 flags. She gives away 12. Which steps find how many are LEFT? (select all)

Reading: Icebergs.q: When a huge chunk of ice breaks off a glacier, scientists call it —
